title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Blue Sky Fruits Limited
body: " Application number 5443  Applicant Blue Skies Holdings Limited objected to the name used by Blue Sky Fruits Limited under the Companies Act 2006.   This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 18 December 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Blue Sky Fruits Limited is changed to 14144850, Ltd "
